app.title: Binance Trading Bot
app.dashboard.title: Binance Auto Trading Bot Dashboard
beginner.guide.title: Quick Guide for Beginners
beginner.guide.tip1: 1. Start by monitoring a few coins (1-3) and learn the bot's behaviour before scaling up.
beginner.guide.tip2: 2. The bot uses a trailing trade strategy with buy/sell grids — avoid changing settings without understanding the impact.
beginner.guide.tip3: 3. Always check the Status section after login to confirm the bot is connected and operating normally.
beginner.guide.tip4: 4. Never invest more capital than you are willing to lose. Cryptocurrencies are volatile and the bot does not guarantee profit.
header.title: Binance Trading Bot
lock.title: Binance Trading Bot
lock.beforeUnlock.title: Before you unlock
lock.beforeUnlock.tip1: Check the Status section after login to confirm the bot is connected and not under pressure.
lock.beforeUnlock.tip2: Start by reviewing a small number of symbols and avoid manual trading until you understand the setup.
lock.beforeUnlock.tip3: Review the tips and tutorials before changing any settings.
unlock.title: Unlock
status.title: Status
status.beginnerTip: Beginners: if Near Stop-Loss or Disabled Symbols increase, review your settings before making manual moves.
status.monitoringSymbolsInfo: You are currently monitoring some symbols but your frontend shows more. That means you added symbols in Global Settings and then removed them. They remain in your frontend but are not monitored. You can remove them by clicking the cross icon.
status.monitoringSymbolsPopover: You are currently monitoring {monitoringSymbolsCount} symbols. However, the symbols you have in your frontend is equal to {cachedMonitoringSymbolsCount}. That means you added some symbols in your Global Settings and after that you removed them. These symbols will remain exists in your frontend and you can see them but they are not monitored. You can remove them by clicking on the cross icon.
filter.title: Filter
filter.hideDisabledTooltip: If enabled, the dashboard won't show coins for which buy and sell tradings are both temporarily disabled, but are still been monitored.
filter.hideDisabledSymbolsInfo: If enabled, the dashboard won't show coins for which buy and sell tradings are both temporarily disabled, but are still been monitored.
account.title: Account Balance
coin.action.overrideMessage: Action {action} will be executed {timeFromNow}, triggered by {triggeredBy}.
coin.action.label: Action -
coin.action.priceNotUpdated: The bot didn't receive the price change for over a min. It means the price hasn't changed in Binance. It will be updated when the bot receives a new price change.
coin.symbol.inactive: {symbol} exists in your monitoring list. However, it is not active on Binance due to emergency downtime, due to it was actually delisted or due to market move too fast. For more details, check Binance announcements.
coin.buySignal.executed: The grid trade #{index} has been executed {timeFromNow} ({time}).
coin.buySignal.notExecuted: The grid trade #{index} has not been executed.
coin.buySignal.notExecutedLastBuyPrice: This grid trade will not be executed because the last buy price is recorded and the first grid trade is not executed.
coin.buySignal.waitingPrevious: Waiting the grid trade #{index} to be executed.
coin.buySignal.athRestriction: The trigger price {triggerPrice} is higher than the ATH buy restricted price {athPrice}. The bot will not place an order even if the current price reaches the trigger price.
coin.buyOrders.title: Buy Open Orders
coin.sellSignal.executed: The grid trade #{index} has been executed {timeFromNow} ({time}).
coin.sellSignal.notExecuted: The grid trade #{index} has not been executed.
coin.sellSignal.waitingPrevious: Waiting the grid trade #{index} to be executed.
coin.sellSignal.title: Sell Signal
coin.sellOrders.title: Sell Open Orders
coin.setting.title: Setting
coin.setting.buyRemoveThreshold: Buy - Last buy price removal threshold
coin.setting.rescheduleATH: Re-schedule when the current price is over ATH restriction
coin.setting.rescheduleDisabled: Re-schedule when the action is disabled
coin.tradingView.title: TradingView
settings.title: Global Settings
settings.safeStart.title: Safe way to begin
settings.safeStart.tip1: Use 1 to 3 symbols first and validate the bot behaviour before scaling.
settings.safeStart.tip2: Keep Stop-Loss enabled if you want automatic loss protection.
settings.safeStart.tip3: If you are unsure, change one section only and monitor the result in Status and Open Trades.
settings.globalConfigTooltip: This configuration will be applied to all symbols, unless a custom per-symbol configuration is set.
settings.intervalTooltip: Set the candle interval for the symbol. The candle interval is used to calculate the trigger price and stop price.
settings.limitTooltip: Set the candle limit for the symbol. The candle limit is used to calculate the trigger price and stop price.
settings.tradingEnabledTooltip: If enabled, the bot will place buy orders when the buy criteria are met. If disabled, the bot will not place buy orders.
settings.removeLastBuyPrice: Remove last buy price for {quoteAsset} when the estimated value is lower than
settings.removeLastBuyPriceTooltip: Set the last buy price removal threshold for symbols with quote asset "{quoteAsset}". When the estimated value drops below the threshold, the bot will remove the last buy price. The threshold will be applied to the symbols which end with "{quoteAsset}" if not configured in the symbol configuration.
settings.athRestriction: Buy Restriction with ATH (All Time High)
settings.restrictionPercentageTooltip: If set to 1.0, the restriction price will be the same as the ATH price. If set to 0.9, the restriction price will be 90% of the ATH price.
settings.maxLossTooltip: If the current price drops below this percentage relative to the last buy price, the bot will place a stop-loss order.
settings.tempDisableBuyTooltip: If stop-loss is triggered, buy trading will be temporarily disabled for the defined number of minutes.
settings.conservativeModeLabel: Enable conservative mode to reduce the selling quantity
settings.conservativeRatioTooltip: The conservative ratio is used to reduce the quantity sold. If set to 0.5, only 50% of the quantity will be sold.
settings.noteChanges: Note that the changes will display after the new price change is processed.
settings.confirmSaveMessage: Are you sure you want to save the changes? The new settings will be applied to all symbols.
settings.lockListTooltip: If enabled, the symbol list will be locked and users will not be able to add or remove symbols.
settings.lockAfterTooltip: Set the time in minutes after which the bot will be automatically locked.
settings.autoTriggerBuyTooltip: If enabled, the bot will automatically trigger the buy order when the criteria are met.
settings.triggerAfterTooltip: Set the time in minutes after which the auto trigger will execute.
settings.rescheduleATH: Re-schedule when the current price is over ATH restriction
settings.rescheduleATHTooltip: If enabled, the auto trigger will be re-scheduled when the current price is above the ATH restriction price.
settings.rescheduleDisabled: Re-schedule when the action is disabled
settings.rescheduleDisabledTooltip: If enabled, the auto trigger will be re-scheduled when the action is disabled.
settings.useDataWithinTooltip: Set the maximum time in minutes to consider TradingView data as valid.
settings.ifDataPassedTooltip: Set the action when TradingView data expires.
settings.deleteAfterTooltip: Set the time in minutes after which logs will be automatically deleted.
settings.orderLimitEnabledTooltip: If enabled, limits the maximum number of buy orders and open trades.
settings.maxBuyOpenOrdersTooltip: Maximum number of buy open orders the bot can have simultaneously.
settings.maxOpenTradesTooltip: Maximum number of open trades the bot can have simultaneously.
settings.buyTriggerTooltip: Set the percentage of price drop to open a buy position.
settings.stopPriceTooltip: Set the stop price percentage for the buy order.
settings.limitPriceTooltip: Set the limit price percentage for the buy order.
settings.minPurchaseTooltip: Set the minimum purchase amount for the symbol with the quote asset.
settings.maxPurchaseTooltip: Set the maximum purchase amount for the symbol with the quote asset.
settings.sellTriggerTooltip: Set the percentage of price rise to open a sell position.
settings.sellStopPriceTooltip: Set the stop price percentage for the sell order.
settings.sellLimitPriceTooltip: Set the limit price percentage for the sell order.
settings.sellQuantityTooltip: Set the percentage of the available quantity to sell.
settings.tvIntervalTooltip: Set the TradingView interval to get technical analysis data.
settings.tvNoBuyTrigger: This interval won't trigger the buy action.
settings.tvStrongBuy: Allow buy trigger when recommendation is Strong buy
settings.tvStrongBuyTooltip: If enabled, the bot will trigger the buy order when TradingView recommends Strong Buy.
settings.tvBuy: Allow buy trigger when recommendation is Buy
settings.tvBuyTooltip: If enabled, the bot will trigger the buy order when TradingView recommends Buy.
settings.tvNoSellTrigger: This interval won't trigger the force sell action.
settings.tvForceSellNeutral: Force sell at the market price when recommendation is Neutral
settings.tvForceSellNeutralTooltip: If enabled, the bot will force sell at market price when TradingView recommends Neutral.
settings.tvForceSellSell: Force sell at the market price when recommendation is Sell
settings.tvForceSellSellTooltip: If enabled, the bot will force sell at market price when TradingView recommends Sell.
settings.tvForceSellStrongSell: Force sell at the market price when recommendation is Strong Sell
settings.tvForceSellStrongSellTooltip: If enabled, the bot will force sell at market price when TradingView recommends Strong Sell.
settings.tvDescription: TradingView is a technical analysis platform that provides indicators and recommendations for trading.
settings.tvInfoCondition: - At least one condition must be checked to activate the TradingView interval. If the interval's conditions are not checked, then the TradingView recommendation of the interval will be ignored.
settings.tvInfoBuyTrigger: - Buy trigger must be satisfied with all intervals' recommendations.
settings.tvInfoForceSell: - Force sell will be executed if satisfy any recommendation.
settings.tvInfoMaxIntervals: - A maximum of three intervals can add to avoid massive traffic to TradingView.
settings.checkWikiPage: please check out the Wiki page
settings.backupWarning: This will download a full backup of the database. The backup includes all configurations, trades and logs.
settings.restoreWarning: This will restore the database from a backup file. All current configurations and data will be overwritten.
settings.restoreDragDrop: Drag 'n' drop the backup archive file here or click to select...
settings.restoreSuccessMessage: The database has been restored successfully. The page will be reloaded.
symbolSettings.title: Customise {symbol} Settings
symbolSettings.whenToCustomize.title: When to customize a symbol
symbolSettings.whenToCustomize.tip1: Customize only if this symbol needs a different strategy from the global configuration.
symbolSettings.whenToCustomize.tip2: If in doubt, keep the global configuration — it was designed as a good starting point.
symbolSettings.resetGridTradeBody: You are about to reset the existing grid trades. If the grid trade is already executed, the execution history will be removed.
symbolSettings.resetGridTradeConfirm: Do you want to reset the grid trade history for the selected symbol?
symbolSettings.resetToGlobalBody: Warning: You are about to reset the symbol setting to the global setting.
symbolSettings.resetToGlobalConfirm: Do you want to delete current symbol setting?
symbolSettings.symbolSpecificNote: In this modal, you can override the global configuration for a specific symbol. Please make sure you understand what the setting is about before changing the configuration value. Note that these are symbol specific settings, which means only this symbol will be applied to settings.
manualTrade.title: Manual trade for all symbols
manualTrade.warning.title: Manual trading uses live balances
manualTrade.warning.tip1: Every manual operation moves real balances. Double-check data before confirming.
manualTrade.warning.tip2: Start with small amounts to understand the mechanics before trading with your full balance.
manualTrade.warning.tip3: Percentage shortcuts (25%, 50%, etc.) can use most of your balance — use with caution.
symbolManualTrade.title: Manual trade for {symbol}
symbolManualTrade.tip.title: Manual trade tip
symbolManualTrade.tip1: Limit orders only execute when the market price reaches your set price. Market orders execute immediately at the current price.
symbolManualTrade.tip2: Use small amounts the first time to understand the mechanics.
dustTransfer.title: Convert small balance to BNB
dustTransfer.description: Convert small cryptocurrency balances into BNB. Only eligible assets will be displayed.
dustTransfer.noAsset: There is no asset to convert.
symbolDelete.title: Remove Symbol - {symbol}
symbolDelete.confirmation: Are you sure you want to remove {symbol} from the monitoring list? This action cannot be undone.
symbolEditLastBuyPrice.title: Edit Last Buy Price for {symbol}
symbolEditLastBuyPrice.helpText: Set the last buy price to activate the sell signal. If set to 0, the bot will treat the symbol as if it hasn't been purchased.
symbolTriggerBuy.title: Trigger Buy Action - {symbol}
symbolTriggerBuy.confirmation: Are you sure you want to trigger the buy action for {symbol}? The bot will try to buy on the next iteration.
symbolTriggerSell.title: Trigger Sell Action - {symbol}
symbolTriggerSell.confirmation: Are you sure you want to trigger the sell action for {symbol}? The bot will try to sell on the next iteration.
symbolEnableAction.title: Resume Symbol Action - {symbol}
symbolEnableAction.confirmation: Are you sure you want to resume the action for {symbol}? The bot will continue monitoring and trading this symbol.
symbolLogs.title: Logs for {symbol}
gridCalculator.title: Grid calculator - {symbol}
gridCalculator.noActiveGrid: To use the calculator, you need to have an active buy grid. Trigger a buy order or set the last buy price.
gridCalculator.buyTriggerPercentage: Buy trigger percentage based on last buy price
gridCalculator.description: Determine the amount you would need to purchase at a specific buy trigger point and achieve break-even if the market price rebounds to your targeted percentage.
gridCalculator.singleSellGridWarning: The suggestion assumes a single sell grid.
gridCalculator.updateManualTradesRequire: Update the previous 2 values based on your manual trades.
gridCalculator.updateManualTradesOptiona: Update the previous 2 values only if you made manual trades.
gridCalculator.resultSetAmountFirst: you first need to set the amount and quantity you manually purchased.
gridCalculator.resultPriceGoDown: the bot will make a new purchase only if the price goes down. Set a trigger percentage inferior to 1.
gridCalculator.resultBreakeven: executing a new grid at {triggerPercent} from your current last buy price with a purchase amount of {amount} {quoteAsset}, would allow you to break-even if the market price rebounds {reboundPercent} from the next buy price.
gridCalculator.resultPointlessTrigger: it is pointless to execute a new grid at {triggerPercent} from your current last buy price if you expect the market price to rebound {reboundPercent}, as you would breakeven by reaching your current last buy price of {lastBuyPrice}.
gridCalculator.resultNoRebound: it is pointless to execute a new grid if you don't expect a price rebound. You should set a price rebound percentage superior to 1.
closedTrades.title: Closed Trades for {asset}
closedTrades.openTradesTooltip: This section displays the estimated profit/loss for the list of assets that are currently open to selling with the last buy price recorded. The calculation is simply adding profit/loss values for each quote asset. Note that it does not represent the historical profit/loss.
closedTrades.deleteConfirmation: Are you sure you want to delete this closed trade?
closedTrades.deleteAllConfirmation: Are you sure you want to delete all closed trades for {asset}?
apiError.title: Binance Trading Bot
apiError.failedToLoad: Failed to load your account information.
apiError.reason1: You are using TestNet API/Secret for Live Binance.
apiError.reason2: You are using Live API/Secret for TestNet Binance.
apiError.reason4: Your API key is not permitted to 'Enable Reading' and 'Enable Spot & Margin Trading'.
apiError.reason5: Your API key is restricted to trusted IP and the server IP is not on the list.
apiError.readDocument: Please read the following document carefully...
closedTrades.deleteAllTradeBody: Are you sure you want to delete all closed trades?
closedTrades.deleteTradeBody: Are you sure you want to delete this closed trade?
coin.buySignal.title: Buy Signal
coin.setting.buyLastBuyPriceRemoval: Buy - Last buy price removal threshold
settings.buyEnabledTooltip: If enabled, the bot will place buy orders when the criteria are met.
settings.safeWayLine1: Use 1 to 3 symbols first and validate the bot behaviour before scaling.
settings.safeWayLine2: Keep Stop-Loss enabled if you want automatic loss protection.
settings.safeWayLine3: If you are unsure, change one section only and monitor the result.
settings.sellEnabledTooltip: If enabled, the bot will place sell orders when the criteria are met.
settings.globalConfigDescription: In this modal, you can configure the global configuration. If the symbol has a specific configuration, the change won't impact the symbol. Please make sure you understand what the setting is about before changing the configuration value.
settings.candleIntervalTooltip: Set candle interval for calculating the highest/lowest price.
settings.candleLimitTooltip: Set the number of candles to retrieve for calculating the highest/lowest price.
settings.athIntervalTooltip: Set candle interval for calculating the ATH (All Time High) price.
settings.athLimitTooltip: Set the number of candles to retrieve for calculating the ATH (All Time High) price.
settings.athRestrictionEnabledTooltip: If enabled, the bot will retrieve ATH (All Time High) price of the coin based on the interval/candle configuration. If the buy trigger price is higher than ATH buy restriction price, the bot will not place a buy order. The bot will place an order when the trigger price is lower than ATH buy restriction price.
settings.restrictionPercentagePopover: Set the percentage to calculate restriction price. For example, if set 0.9 and the ATH (All Time High) price is $110, the restriction price will be $99 for stop limit order.
settings.stopLossEnabledTooltip: If enabled, the bot will sell the coin when it reaches the configured amount of the loss from the last buy price. You can enable this feature to prevent losing more than expected.
settings.maxLossPopover: Set maximum loss percentage for stop-loss. For example, if set 0.80, it means you won't lose more than -20% of the last buy price. When you purchased the coin at $100 and the current price reaches $80, the bot will place a market order to sell all available balance.
settings.tempDisableBuyPopover: Set for how long to disable buying in minutes after placing a stop-loss order. For example, if set 360, the bot will temporarily disable buying for 6 hours.
settings.conservativeModeDescription: Reduce the sell trigger price proportionally to the number of executed buy grids - applies only to grids with at least 2 executed buy trades
settings.conservativeModePopover: If enabled, the bot will sell at a trigger price reduced by the conservative ratio for each executed buy grid. You can use this feature in bear market conditions to secure smaller benefits over unreached higher gains. At least 2 buy trades must have been executed for the ratio to be applied.
settings.conservativeRatioPopover: Set the conservative factor to be applied on sell trades with at least 2 executed buy grids. For example, if set to 0.90, your current grid sell percentage will be reduced by 10% for each executed buy grid (except the first one). If your sell trigger percentage is 1.10 and you have 3 executed buy grids, the sell order trigger will be 1.081. The sell trigger is not modified if you have only 1 executed buy grid.
settings.tradingViewPopover: TradingView is the service that provides technical analysis based on various indicators such as oscillators and moving averages. The bot is integrated with TradingView summary recommendation to control the buy action.
settings.confirmWarningIntro: Warning: You are about to save the global configuration.
settings.confirmQuestion: Do you want to apply the changes for all symbols or just global configuration?
settings.confirmApplyAllWarning: If you choose to apply for all symbols, then customised symbol configurations will be removed.
settings.confirmGlobalOnlyNote: If you choose to apply the global configuration only, then the symbols that are different from the global configuration will be displayed as customised.
settings.basedOnLastBuyPrice: based on the last buy price
settings.buyTriggerPopoverLowest: Set the trigger percentage for buying based on the lowest price. i.e. if set 1.01 and the lowest price is $100, then the bot will buy the coin when the current price reaches $101. You cannot set less than 1, because it will never reach the trigger price unless there is a deep decline before the next process.
settings.buyTriggerPopoverLastBuy: Set the trigger percentage for buying based on the last buy price. i.e. if set 0.8 and the last buy price is $100, then the bot will buy the coin when the current price reaches $80. You cannot set higher than 1.
settings.buyStopPricePopover: Set the percentage to calculate stop price. i.e. if set 1.01 and current price $100, stop price will be $101 for stop limit order.
settings.buyLimitPricePopover: Set the percentage to calculate limit price. i.e. if set 1.011 and current price $100, limit price will be $101.10 for stop limit order.
settings.minPurchaseAmountPopover: Set min purchase amount for symbols with quote asset "{quoteAsset}". The min purchase amount will be applied to the symbols which ends with "{quoteAsset}" if not configured the symbol configuration.
settings.maxPurchaseAmountPopover: Set max purchase amount for symbols with quote asset "{quoteAsset}". The max purchase amount will be applied to the symbols which ends with "{quoteAsset}" if not configured the symbol configuration.
settings.sellTriggerPopover: Set the trigger percentage for minimum profit. i.e. if set 1.06, minimum profit will be 6%. So if the last sell price is $100, then the bot will sell the coin when the current price reaches $106.
settings.sellStopPricePopover: Set the percentage to calculate stop price. i.e. if set 0.99 and current price $106, stop price will be $104.94 for stop limit order.
settings.sellLimitPricePopover: Set the percentage to calculate limit price. i.e. if set 0.98 and current price $106, limit price will be $103.88 for stop limit order.
settings.sellQuantityPopover: Set the quantity percentage for selling. i.e. if set 0.5 and own 50 coins, then it will only sell 25 of owned coins. If set 1, then it will sell 100% of owned coins.
settings.placeholderMaxBuyOpenOrders: Enter maximum number of buy open orders
settings.placeholderMaxOpenTrades: Enter maximum number of open trades
closedTrades.closedTradesTooltip: This section displays the total profit of each asset as well as the number of closed trades and the last trade profit.
app.toast.connectionFailed: Unable to connect to the server.
app.connectionFailed.message: Could not connect to the bot server. The WebSocket connection failed after multiple attempts.
app.connectionFailed.hint: If you are accessing a static deployment (e.g. Vercel), set the backend URL via: localStorage.setItem('backendUrl', 'wss://your-server-url')
coin.action.willBeExecuted: Action {action} will be executed {timeFromNow}, triggered by {triggeredBy}.
manualTrade.description: In this modal, you can trade all symbols manually. It only supports Market - Total buy order and Market - Amount sell order. If you enter 0, the bot won't place an order. If you already have a last buy price, the bot will calculate average cost. The bot will monitor the order after placing it, which may increase API weight usage.
manualTrade.commissionNote: If you sell 100% of the remaining balance, the bot will automatically deduct 0.1% commission.
symbolManualTrade.description: In this modal, you can trade {symbol} manually. If you already have the last buy price, the bot will calculate average cost. The bot will monitor the order after placing the buy order, which may increase API weight usage.
coin.tradingView.dataOlderThan: The TradingView data is older than {minutes} minutes. The data may not be accurate.
